summary: V68.28 EXHAUSTIVE AUDIT COMPLETE — ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE Sovereign Unified Engine PWA. Backend: 58/60 tests passed (97%). Frontend: All core features functional. CRITICAL: 84-99 401 errors during rapid navigation indicate auth race condition. All 11 console tabs unlocked for owner. Starseed Adventure 'Begin Adventure' button ACTIVE (regression fixed). No auto-playing audio (SILENCE SHIELD compliant). Chamber backdrops rendering correctly.

minor.issue: Owner account (kyndsmiles@gmail.com) has role='user' instead of expected 'admin'. Login auto-upgrades to admin but profile/me still shows 'user'.
Returns 405 Method Not Allowed - endpoint expects POST not GET

integration_issues.issue: 84-99 401 errors in console during rapid navigation between pages. Token exists in localStorage but AuthContext may have race condition during hydration.

issues: Asset size ~1.8MB+ per chamber (WebP compression pending - documented but not blocking)

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix 401 race condition during rapid navigation - AuthContext hydration issue. Token exists in localStorage but not consistently passed during page transitions.
LOW: Update owner account role from 'user' to 'admin' in database or fix login auto-upgrade to persist
LOW: Fix GET /api/knowledge/deep-dive to accept GET method or update documentation
critical_code_review_comments: AUTH RACE CONDITION: StarseedAdventure.js has buildHeaders() workaround reading directly from localStorage - this pattern should be applied to AuthContext globally
CONSOLE TABS: All 11 tabs functional for owner - Orbit, Mix, Culture, Audio, Text, Layer, Rec, FX, AI, Out, Me
CHAMBER BACKDROPS: All 10 chamber types return valid images via POST /api/ai-visuals/chamber
STARSEED ADVENTURE: Begin Adventure button is ACTIVE - regression fixed
SILENCE SHIELD: No auto-playing audio detected - compliant
FLATLAND: No fixed-position modals detected - compliant

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core features working, 401 race condition during navigation)

context_for_next_testing_agent: V68.28 exhaustive audit complete. CRITICAL ISSUE: 84-99 401 errors during rapid navigation indicate auth race condition in AuthContext. The StarseedAdventure.js has a workaround (buildHeaders() reading directly from localStorage) that should be applied globally. All 11 console tabs verified unlocked for owner. Chamber mini-games (herbology pluck/brew, masonry, meditation) all functional. Starseed Adventure 'Begin Adventure' button is ACTIVE (not dead). No auto-playing audio. All chamber backdrops rendering correctly.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: AuthContext's memoized authHeaders can briefly be {} during hydration. When components mount and immediately make API calls, the token may not be available yet.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: StarseedAdventure.js implements buildHeaders() that reads directly from localStorage. This pattern should be applied to AuthContext or all components making authenticated requests should use a similar direct localStorage read.
